parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({event_type: 'review-pr', client_payload: {consumer_repo: $json.consumer_repo, pr_number: $json.pr_number, head_sha: $json.head_sha, base_ref: $json.base_ref, consumer_token: $json.consumer_token}}) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { status: 'dispatched', consumer_repo: $('Mint installation tokens').item.json.consumer_repo, pr_number: $('Mint installation tokens').item.json.pr_number } }}
